description_long: This plant pot features a rounded, slightly tapered form with a smooth terracotta-colored surface. The exterior is adorned with a prominent, dark brown leaf motif that wraps around the body, giving it a natural and earthy aesthetic. The leaf design is embossed, adding a tactile, three-dimensional quality to the pot. The rim is subtly defined, and the overall finish is matte with a slight sheen, suggesting a ceramic or clay material. The pot appears to be medium-sized, suitable for tabletop or small garden use. No visible drainage holes are present on the bottom.
description: A terracotta-colored plant pot with an embossed dark brown leaf motif and a smooth, matte finish. The pot is medium-sized and rounded, ideal for decorative indoor or outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the largest section of the embossed leaf motif, with the leaf's veins and texture clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the continuation of the leaf motif wrapping around the pot, with the seam of the design visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite side of the leaf motif, with less detail and a smoother surface.
description_view_3: Other side view shows the edge of the leaf motif and the pot's smooth, curved surface.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for garden paths or patio corners as a decorative accent
